card.name: In Search of Eternity
card.text: Whenever a permanent you control leaves the battlefield, you may cast a permanent spell with mana value 1 greater than that permanent's mana value from your hand without paying its mana cost. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: The Arbiter's Watcher
card.text: Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.) The Arbiter's Watcher has first strike as long as it has a counter on it.

card.name: Icedroid
card.text: Icedroid costs {1} less to cast for each card you've drawn this turn. Whenever Icedroid enters or you cast another spell with mana value 5 or greater, tap target nonland permanent and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Lost Ghast
card.text: Whenever Lost Ghast enters or attacks, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Savan Warden
Twisting Nebulas
card.text: Whenever Twisting Nebulas or another enchantment you control enters, draw a card.

card.name: Last Light of Naroz
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an enchantment. Return target enchantment card with mana value less than or equal to the sacrificed enchantment's mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Stack Popper // Pop
card.text:
When Stack Popper enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
---
Counter target spell. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library)

card.name: Ghost of Fallen Angels
card.text: {T}: Mill a card. 1B —

card.name: Recursive Pyromage
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Recursive Pyromage, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Chosen of the Grand Oracles // Oracles' Call
card.text:
Flying This creature gets +1/+1 for each card you've drawn this turn.
---
Surveil 1, then draw a card. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Package Manager
card.text: When Package Manager enters, you may search your library for a card that shares a nonland permanent type with a nonland permanent you control that doesn't share a name with a permanent you control, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Watching Eternity
card.text: Enchant creature At the beginning of your end step, Watching Eternity deals 1 you. Put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Circular Import
card.text: Destroy target creature. Put up to one card in exile into their owner's graveyards.

card.name: Unexpected Token
card.text: When Unexpected Token enters, search your library for a basic land card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Spells you cast with mana value 5 or greater costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Drorix, Cosmic Outcast
card.text: Enchantments you control have ward {1}. [+1]: Surveil 1. Create a 1/1 white Human enchantment creature token if you control three or more enchantments. [-1]: Another target nonland permanent becomes an enchantment and loses all other card types.

card.name: Luminescent Golem
card.text: When Luminescent Golem enters, you draw a card and create two 1/1 white Human enchantment creature tokens.

card.name: The Final Frontier
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Cavesplitter
card.text: Flying Whenever Cavesplitter or another enchantment enters under your control, target creature loses all abilities until the end of your next turn. 6 —

card.name: Sava's Last Eclipse
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Sava's Last Eclipse, sacrifice X noncreature permanents. Destroy up to X target creatures.

card.name: Cosmically Centered
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1." (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Otherworldly Wayfarer
card.text: When Otherworldly Wayfarer enters, draw a card if you control three or more enchantments.

card.name: The Arbiter's Raider
card.text: Prowess Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.)

card.name: Past Left Behind
card.text: Surveil 4, then draw a card. (To surveil 4, look at the top four cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Stack Pusher // Push
card.text:
Whenever Stack Pusher attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.
---
The next time you cast a noncreature spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Shrouded Subjugator
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Shrouded Subjugator, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control not named Shrouded Subjugator.

card.name: Ocean Watcher
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Ocean Watcher.

card.name: Shock
card.text: Shock deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Fungal Raze
card.text: Destroy target enchantment. Draw a card.

card.name: Traversing the Paths
card.text: When Traversing the Paths enters, if it was cast, exile all creatures. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a face-up enchantment spell you own from exile.

card.name: Ethereal Spellbinder // Lightbinding
card.text:
Flash When Ethereal Spellbinder enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.
---
Up to one taret creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Enduring Guardian // Hallowed Eternity
card.text:
When Enduring Guardian enters, return target creature or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.
---
Target player mills ten cards. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library)

card.name: Boatman of Kala
card.text: Boatman of Kala gets +1/+1 for each token you control.

card.name: Depths Giant
card.text: Trample When Depths Giant enters, mill three cards, then put a card milled this way into your hand. {2}{G}, Discard Depths Giant: Mill three cards, then put a permanent card milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Eldo, Abyssal City
card.text: As Eldo, Abyssal City enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {2}{U}, {T}: Return target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Night Rummager
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, each opponent loses 2 life. {5}, {T}, Pay 1 life: Draw a card.

card.name: Karan Assassin
card.text: Menace, deathtouch If a noncreature permanent would cause your opponent to lose life, they lose that much life plus one instead.

card.name: Interplanar Informer
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) When Interplanar Informer dies, if it had an Aura attached to it, you may return an Aura that was attached to it from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Laban Guardian
card.text: Whenever a nontoken enchantment you control enters, create a 1/1 white Human enchantment creature token.

card.name: Planar Guard
card.text: Whenever you draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, you may tap target creature.

card.name: Summoner of True Light
card.text: Vigilance Once each turn, when a creature you control with power 2 or less enters, you may draw a card and gain 1 life. 4W —

card.name: Cosmic Watcher
card.text: Flash Once each turn, whenever you cast Cosmic Watcher or another spell during an opponent's turn, draw a card. 4U —

card.name: Corruption From Beyond
card.text: Menace {2}, Sacrifice an enchantment: Draw a card. Activate only once during each of your turns. 4B —

card.name: Hellfire Wyrm
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature you control attacks, Hellfire Wyrm deals 1 damage to each opponent. 4R —

card.name: Preserver of Voro
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, mill two cards, then return a card milled this way to your hand. 4G —

card.name: Tree of Celestial Light
card.text: When Tree of Celestial Light enters, exile target creature an opponent controls with mana value less than or equal to the number of enchantments you control until Tree of Celestial Light leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Memory Leak
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you control a permanent with mana value 5 or greater, its owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library instead.

card.name: Seeker of Eternity
card.text: Flying When Seeker of Eternity enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Marauder of Sava
card.text: Menace When Marauder of Sava dies, it deals damage to each opponent equal to its power.

card.name: Harmony of Voro
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control.

card.name: Clockwork Disciple // Glare of Infinity
card.text:
When Clockwork Disciple enters, return target creature or enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
---
Destroy target attacking creature. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Sky of Beya
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, you may return Sky of Beya from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Look Across the Lake
card.text: Mill two cards. {2}{B}{B}, Exile Look Across the Lake from your graveyard: Return target enchantment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Careless Whims
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn.

card.name: Titan of Sunrise
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each land card in your graveyard. When Titan of Sunrise enters, return a land card from your graveyard to the battlefield, then return a nonland card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Destiny Diviner
card.text: Destiny Diviner gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control. Destiny Diviner has trample as long as you control an Aura.

card.name: Moonlight Spellbinder
card.text: When Moonlight Spellbinder enters, you draw your second card each turn, or you cast your second spell each turn, surveil 1. BB —

card.name: Whisperer of The Arbiter
card.text: If you would draw a card, instead look at the top two cards of your library, exile one of them, then put the other into your hand.

card.name: Scorcher
card.text: When Scorcher enters, it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Dutiful Companion
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has three.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Dutiful Companion, create a 1/1 white Human enchantment creature token. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Griffin of Serenity
card.text: Flying Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.) At the beginning of your end step, if Griffin of Serenity has a counter on it, surveil 1.

card.name: Unchained Karan
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has three.) At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to that card's mana value minus the number of counters on Unchained Karan.

card.name: Kala Eradicator
card.text: Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.) Whenever Kala Eradicator attacks, exile the top card of your library. If it isn't a creature or Kala Eradicator has a counter on it, you may play it this turn.

card.name: Yuku Mystic
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Landfall — Whenever a land enters under your control, you gain 1 life. If a counter was put on Yuku Mystic this turn, you gain 2 life instead.

card.name: Warp Gateway
card.text: When Warp Gateway enters, create a 1/1 white Human enchantment creature token. Whenever a creature you control dies, if it had counters on it, you may put those counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Deny Access
card.text: If you've cast another noncreature spell this turn, draw a card. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Rite of the Grand Oracles
card.text: When Rite of the Grand Oracles enters, creatures you control gain menace until end of turn. Whenever you attack an opponent, if that player has lost life this turn, that player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Marring Flames
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. When you do, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, Marring Flames deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target.

card.name: Byte Down
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Sunrise Lookout
card.text: Flying When Sunrise Lookout enters, you gain 3 life if you control an enchantment. {T}, Sacrifice an enchantment: You draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Intellect From Beyond
card.text: When Intellect From Beyond enters, draw a card if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, surveil 1.

card.name: Behemoth Beckoner
card.text: Deathtouch When Behemoth Beckoner enters, each opponent loses 3 life if a permanent card was put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn. {5}{B}{B}, Exile Behemoth Beckoner from your graveyard: Create a 6/6 black Demon creature token.

card.name: Savan Veteran
card.text: Haste When Savan Veteran enters, if another nonland permanent you control has entered this turn, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample and haste until end of turn. {T}, Discard a noncreature card: Draw a card.

card.name: Sentinel of Sanctuaries
card.text: Trample When Sentinel of Sanctuaries enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {4}{G}: Sentinel of Sanctuaries gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each land you control.

card.name: Shindu, Gleaming City
card.text: As Shindu, Gleaming City enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {2}{W}, {T}: Copy target triggered ability you control that was caused by a permanent you control entering. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Zidan, Shadowy City
card.text: As Zidan, Shadowy City enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {2}{B}, {T}: Mill two cards.

card.name: Kama, Shattered City
card.text: As Kama, Shattered City enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {2}{R}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until end of turn.

card.name: Toshin, Verdant City
card.text: As Toshin, Verdant City enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {2}{G}, {T}: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Collected Entrancing
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two enchantment cards with total mana value 4 or less onto the battlefield under your control. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Power Off
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {1}{U}: Creatures you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Crystalized Dread
card.text: Whenever a player draws a card, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Pillar of Fury
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each attacking creature. Creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Firmness of Toshin
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +4/+4, has trample, and has "This creature must be blocked if able."

card.name: Tranquil Wanderer // Seek Tranquility
card.text:
Flying Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.)
---
You draw a card and gain 3 life. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Final Arrival
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library, then an opponent separates them into two piles. Then you may exile a card with mana value 5 or greater from your graveyard. If you do, put both piles into your hand. Otherwise, put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Door to Eternity
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Choose one— • Draw a card. • Each opponent loses 3 life. 2B —

card.name: Rage of Sava
card.text: Haste Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Rage of Sava, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Moonrise
card.text: Mill twenty cards. For each card type, you may return a card of that type from your graveyard to your hand. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, land, planeswalker, and sorcery are card types.)

card.name: Shadowmare
card.text: When Shadowmare enters, you may discard a card. If you do, surveil 1, then draw a card. B —

card.name: Heartless Executor
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Heartless Executor, exile target nonland permanent, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Cosmic Roamer // Starseeking
card.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature, nonland card in your graveyard.
---
Mill four cards. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Fragments of Times Past
card.text: Return up to three target creature cards from any graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Warmth of a Thousand Souls
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature, nonland permanent you control. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has haste. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them this turn.

card.name: Herald of New Worlds // Explore Worlds
card.text:
Noncreature enchantments you control are 2/2 creatures in addition to their other types.
---
Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. (Also shuffle this card.)

card.name: The Arbiter's Sight
card.text: Flying, vigilance When The Arbiter's Sight attacks, exile target enchantment card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of the exiled card. At the beginning of your end step, if an enchantment you control entered this turn, create a 1/1 white Human enchantment creature token.

card.name: Naroz Sentinel
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has three.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Naroz Sentinel, mill three cards.

card.name: Vicious Fiend
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Vicious Fiend attacks, it deals 3 damage to the player or planeswalker its attacking.

card.name: Artificial Ferocity
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature has trample. When Artificial Ferocity enters, enchanted creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Dreary Voyager
card.text: When Dreary Voyager enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Creatures you control with counters on them have vigilance.

card.name: Leviathan Caller
card.text: When Leviathan Caller enters, surveil 2. {3}{U}{U}, Exile Leviathan Caller from your graveyard: Search your library for a card with mana value 5 or greater, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Malignant Hexer
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Malignant Hexer, sacrifice a noncreature, nonland permanent. Deathtouch When Malignant Hexer enters, mill two cards. You draw two cards and gain 2 life.

card.name: Herald of Sparks
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn. Prowess When Herald of Sparks enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Phantom Stag
card.text: Whenever Phantom Stag enters or attacks, mill two cards. Whenever a noncreature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you may put a +1/+1 counter on Phantom Stag. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Undefined Reference
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. It's controller draws a card.

card.name: List Indexer
card.text: When List Indexer enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, exile another target nonland permanent, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Abyssal Callback
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each 1 life an opponent has lost this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.) Destroy target creature. You gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Race Against Omnipotence
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has haste. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: The Arbiter's Strength
card.text: Whenever a triggered ability of a noncreature enchantment you control triggers, you may pay {1}. If you do, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Adrift Surveyor
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another nontoken enchantment. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that enchantment. 3W —

card.name: Wistful Observer
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a noncreature, nonland card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Cache Recovery
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw a card. Each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Vulpine Sage // Energization
card.text:
Whenever Vulpine Sage attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
---
Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains haste until end of turn. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Deepgrowth Drake
card.text: Trample Whenever Deepgrowth Drake enters or attacks, choose a basic land type. Create a tapped enchantment land token with that type.

card.name: The Arbiter's Elite
card.text: When The Arbiter's Elite enters, you gain 2 life. Once each turn, when you gain life, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ghastly Wanderer
card.text: Flying Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Ghastly Wanderer, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If you do, you may cast a copy of it.

card.name: Fallen of Kara
card.text: When Fallen of Kara leaves the battlefield, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. 2B —

card.name: Splintering Fire
card.text: If an opponent has lost life this turn, this spell costs {2} less to cast. Splintering Fire deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Lost to the Storm
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample. When enchanted creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Paths of Stolen Life
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target attacking creature, then you may untap each creature you control with a counter on it.

card.name: Herald of Naroz
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) When Herald of Naroz dies, draw a card.

card.name: Nausea From Beyond
card.text: When Nausea From Beyond enters, put up to one target card from your graveyard on top of your library. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Gazing Rage // Angerseeking
card.text:
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Gazing Rage.
---
Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them this turn. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library)

card.name: Champion of Drakol
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are put on another creature you control, you may put a +1/+1 counter on Champion of Drakol. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: The Arbiter
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each enchantment you control. When The Arbiter enters, if it was cast, you control target player during their next turn. After that turn, that player takes an extra turn.

card.name: Peaceful Charmer
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Peaceful Charmer, untap up to one target creature. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Twilight Revelation
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. At the beginning of each opponent's end step, if you cast two or more spells during that player's turn, return Twilight Revelation from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Drakoli Piracy
card.text: When Drakoli Piracy enters, you may sacrifice a permanent. Once each turn, when a card you own is put into a graveyard from the battlefield or your hand, you may draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Wisps of Flaming Brilliance
card.text: Enchant creature When Wisps of Flaming Brilliance enters, enchanted creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has menace.

card.name: Goliath Assailant
card.text: Trample As long as Goliath Assailant is an enchantment, it's an Aura with "Enchant creature" and "Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample." 2G —

card.name: Doomteller Adept
card.text: When Doomteller Adept enters, exile up to three target cards from graveyards.

card.name: Cultist of Cold Fate
card.text: Sorcery spells you cast have flash. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 3 or greater, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Harbinger of Demise
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Demon of Ruinous Fire
card.text: Ward—{1}, Pay 3 life (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1} and pays 3 life.) Whenever you cast a spell that targets, Demon of Ruinous Fire gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Illuminating Augur
card.text: Whenever one or more noncreature cards is put into a graveyard from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on Illuminating Augur. 4G —

card.name: Dread From Beyond // Looming Destruction
card.text:
When Dread From Beyond enters, search your library for a basic Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
---
Destroy target enchantment. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Celestial Encroachment
card.text: Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, each player mills two cards, then for each player, you may exile a card they own milled this way. You may play it for as long as it remains exiled, and spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast it.

card.name: All The Darkest Hopes
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, surveil 1. As long as there are five or more creature cards in your graveyard, creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Free Rider
card.text: When Free Rider enters, it deals 2 damage to each opponent. Whenever Free Rider attacks, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Inquiry From Beyond
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Trample, ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you cast a spell that targets, put a +1/+1 counter on Inquiry From Beyond.

card.name: Uncover
card.text: Return target enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Cosmic Immenseness
card.text: When Cosmic Immenseness enters, search your library for a card with mana value 5 or greater, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, draw a card. If it had mana value 7 or greater, tap each nonland permanent target player controls.

card.name: Celestial Darkness
card.text: When Celestial Darkness enters or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you draw a card and lose 1 life. {2}{B}: Sacrifice Celestial Darkness.

card.name: Lively Pup
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Lively Pup has haste as long as you've cast a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Spidroid
card.text: Whenever Spidroid enters or you uncover a card, surveil 2. (You may cast this as an enchantment from your graveyard for its uncover cost.) 3G — (You may cast this as an enchantment from your graveyard for its uncover cost.)

card.name: Sunset Dreamer
card.text: Sunset Dreamer gets +2/+2 as long as there are three or more counters among permanents you control. {1}{W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Ghastly Hunter
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has three.) At the beginning of each end step, if a counter was put on Ghastly Hunter this turn, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a permanent card with mana value 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand.

card.name: Leviathan Tides
card.text: Whenever you cast an Omen spell, exile it instead of shuffling it into its owner's library. For as long as it remains exiled, you may cast creature spells exiled this way.

card.name: Writhing Mound
card.text: When Writhing Mound enters, target player sacrifices a creature. At the beginning of each end step, if a nonland permanent you control left the battlefield this turn, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Blood of Moonlight
card.text: Blood of Moonlight deals 3 damage to any target. Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Deepgrowth Explorer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may mill two cards. As long as there are ten or more cards in your graveyard, Deepgrowth Explorer gets +3/+3 and has trample.

card.name: Lost Curiosity
card.text: When Lost Curiosity enters, you may sacrifice another enchantment. When you do, exile target creature. Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, you put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Energy Displacer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. 3U —

card.name: Reaper of Kara
card.text: Flying As long as you've drawn two or more cards this turn, Reaper of Kara gets +2/+0. Whenever Reaper of Kara attacks, surveil 1.

card.name: Burning Quasar
card.text: Burning Quasar costs {2} less to cast if an opponent has lost life outside of combat this turn. Burning Quasar deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: Monk of Deafening Peace
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you cast a spell that targets, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Idyllic Tutor
card.text: Search your library for an enchantment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Wavebringer // Invoke the Tides
card.text:
Flash Flying Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.)
---
Draw three cards, then discard two cards. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Eternity From Beyond
card.text: As long as there are five or more cards in exile, Eternity From Beyond is a 4/4 Jellyfish Horror enchantment creature with lifelink. {2}{B}{B}, {T}, Exile an enchantment card from your graveyard: You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Kalan Explorer
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Kalan Explorer, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Deepgrowth Expansion
card.text: Search your library for a basic Forest card and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. You gain 3 life if you control five or more lands.

card.name: Magitel, Flaming Brilliance
card.text: Flying Magitel gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control. Whenever Magitel attacks, exile target enchantment, then return it to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Cira, Lost in the Stars
card.text: Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has none.) Whenever Cira deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1. If she has a counter on her, draw a card.

card.name: Talza, the Defeated
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice a permanent. Whenever a permanent card is put into your graveyard from your hand or the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Talza, the Defeated.

card.name: Jhakan, Failed Lich
card.text: Whenever you attack, target attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. R —

card.name: Nashar, Starry Turtle
card.text: Whenever an enchantment you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you don't control, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Designed Emptiness
card.text: Other enchantment you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it. {2}{W}: Target enchantment you control becomes a 0/0 creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Naroz Icebreaker
card.text: Whenever you surveil, scry, or shuffle, surveil 1. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Into Eternity
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Firespace Seeker
card.text: Firespace Seeker enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. When Firespace Seeker dies, you may put its counters on target creature.

card.name: Bringer of New Times // Aurora Splinters
card.text:
Bringer of New Times gets +1/+1 for each noncreature permanent you control.
---
Destroy target artifact or enchantment. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Illuminating Vortex
card.text: When Illuminating Vortex enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Creatures you control with counters on them get +1/+1.

card.name: Cold Truths
card.text: Draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you've cast another noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Dark Dragonfire
card.text: Up to one target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. {2}{B}, Exile Dark Dragonfire from your graveyard: You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Lightning Radiator
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, choose any target. Lightning Radiator deals 2 damage to that target if you've cast a nonartifact, noncreature spell this turn. Lightning Radiator deals 2 damage to that target if you've cast at least three spells this turn.

card.name: Chromatic Starlight
card.text: When Chromatic Starlight enters, if mana was spent to cast it, add one mana of any color. {2}, Sacrifice Chromatic Starlight: Draw a card. Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Emptylands Rover
card.text: {1}, {T}: Surveil 1. {5}: Until end of turn, Emptylands Rover gets +1/+1 for each noncreature permanent you control.

card.name: Darkwave Container
card.text: When Darkwave Container enters, you draw a card. {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once during each of your turns.

card.name: The Arbiter's Retriever
card.text: When The Arbiter's Retriever dies, return another target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile The Arbiter's Retriever.

card.name: Spacelight
card.text: Enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Energizer
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Energizer, surveil 1.

card.name: Swarm Engine
card.text: When Swarm Engine enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each noncreature, nonland permanent you control. {T}: Target noncreature, nonland permanent you control becomes a creature. (This lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Shorian, Herald of the Beyond
card.text: If you would draw a card, instead mill four cards, then return one of the milled cards from your graveyard to your hand. While you have less than 30 cards in your main library, creatures you control can't be blocked.

card.name: Peace in Twilight // Enter Night
card.text:
Whenever you cast your second noncreature spell each turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
---
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. You gain 2 life. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Warlock of Venomous Fire
card.text: Menace Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 2/2 black Warlock creature token.

card.name: Unbound Soul
card.text: Enchant permanent When Unbound Soul enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Spells that target enchanted permanent cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: The Arbiter's Harmonizer
card.text: Once each turn, when you cast an enchantment spell, you may draw a card. Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, put a +1/+1 counter on The Arbiter's Harmonizer.

card.name: Beyan Tormentor
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. 2WB —

card.name: Necromancer of the Depths
card.text: Nonland permanent cards in your graveyard have uncover. Their uncover costs are equal to their mana costs. (You may cast them from your graveyard as enchantments for their uncover cost.)

card.name: Lantern Bearer
card.text: Haste When Lantern Bearer enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Risen Thicket // Treegrowth
card.text:
When Risen Thicket enters, draw two cards.
---
Put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. Surveil 1. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Night of Stopped Water
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, target player may discard a card. If they don't, they lose 1 life and you gain 1 life. {5}: Draw a card.

card.name: Sunset Dancer
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has three.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Sunset Dancer deals 1 damage to each opponent and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Endless Wreckage
card.text: Endless Wreckage deals 4 damage to any target. Surveil 4. {2}{B}{R}{G}, Exile Endless Wreckage from your graveyard: Draw two cards. Endless Wreckage deals 2 damage to each player.

card.name: Knight of Beya // Reinforcements
card.text:
Other creatures you control get +1/+1.
---
Create two 1/1 white Human enchantment creature tokens. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Watchful Gaze
card.text: Whenever Watchful Gaze or another enchantment you control enters, if you cast it, exile target nonland permanent. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. At the beginning of your end step, untap up to four lands.

card.name: Endless Sunrise
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Endless Sunrise, sacrifice a creature. Put X +1/+1 counters on each creature you control, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Ancients From Beyond
card.text: Flash Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast and have flash. Once each turn, when you cast a noncreature spell, you may draw cards equal to that spells mana value, then discard two cards.

card.name: Cosmic Incarnation
card.text: Flying Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if it has two.) Whenever one or more counters are put on Cosmic Incarnation, it deals 1 damage to any target. Surveil 1.

card.name: Marshland Birth
card.text: Return up to two target nonland cards from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Marshland Birth.

card.name: Construct DCO
card.text: Flying, Haste

card.name: Treasure DCO
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
